name: Royal Blue Sapphire
description: An exceptional 'Royal Blue' specimen with vivid saturation and eye-clean clarity. Precision cushion cut to maximize internal brilliance.

name: Sunset Padparadscha
description: The rarest of sapphires. A perfect 50/50 delicate balance of lotus-pink and orange hues. Oval brilliant cut.

name: Vivid Ceylon Ruby
description: A rare Sri Lankan ruby featuring a vibrant 'Pigeon Blood' red hue. Minimal inclusions, excellent transparency.

name: Teal Parti Sapphire
description: Unique bi-color zoning of deep forest green and ocean blue. A modern choice for bespoke engagement rings.

name: Cornflower Blue Sapphire
description: Classic 'Cornflower' blue with a velvety appearance. Heart-shaped cut with excellent proportions.

name: Color-Change Alexandrite
description: A true phenomenon stone. Shifts from a deep forest green in daylight to a purplish-red under incandescent light.

name: Chrome Green Tourmaline
description: Intense neon-green saturation often mistaken for fine emerald. Emerald-cut for a classic architectural look.

name: Cobalt Blue Spinel
description: A collector's favorite. Electric blue spinel with high refractive index and diamond-like luster.

name: Golden Yellow Sapphire
description: A bright, sunny 'Canary' yellow sapphire. Radiant cut to enhance the stone's natural dispersion.
